info.title: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Supply Chain Management
info.description: Ballerina connector exposing the Supply Chain surface of the Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance and Operations OData REST API, generated from the live tenant CSDL metadata.

scopes.https://erp.dynamics.com/.default: Access Dynamics 365 Finance and Operations on behalf of the application

bearerAuth.description: A pre-acquired Azure AD access token passed as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

select.name: $select
select.description: OData `$select`: comma-separated list of properties to return.

top.name: $top
top.description: Maximum number of records to return.

crossCompany.name: cross-company
crossCompany.description: Query across legal entities instead of the caller's default.
